steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence says "it was not a surprise" that the book received a Newbery Honor — implying readers had already responded positively. The blank must describe a reader action that would logically predict or justify an award.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: a negative or neutral response would make the award surprising, not expected. ✗
  • Choice B: readers don't create or produce books. ✗
  • Choice C — 'praised': a strongly positive reader response that would naturally lead one to anticipate an award. ✓
  • Choice D: a negative response contradicts the "not a surprise" framing. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
